name: Corn Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 Jalapeno Chile; seeds removed and finely chopped
1/4 cup Green Onions with tops; sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and finely chop the Jalapeno chile.
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
3. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, about 1 hour.
Makes about 2 1/3 cups salsa.
